_instructions: Save to ~/Documents/Claude/lovable-to-app-store/memory/agencies/{agency-slug}.json — this is the top-level agency file. It holds Apple Developer credentials shared across ALL orgs and apps that your agency ships.
_note: The 4 ASC secrets below map directly to GitHub secrets set on every repo. CERT_PASS is stored in GitHub secrets only — never write it here. APPLE_TEAM_ID is per-org, not here.
_cert_pass_note: CERT_PASS lives in GitHub secrets only. Never store it in this file.

github_repo_secrets.CERT_PASS: ← set manually, never stored in memory files
github_repo_secrets.APPLE_TEAM_ID: ← comes from the ORG file, not this file

notes: your agency is the Apple Developer account owner. All apps shipped under any org use these ASC credentials for CI signing.
